_comment: Inherits the dev config's strict-mode flags, then flips noEmit off
and aims tsc at ./src only — the test/ and examples/ trees stay in
the dev config so editors still typecheck them, but they don't
The .bun field on the dev config's `types: ["bun"]` would pull
Bun-specific globals into emitted .d.ts files (assert, Bun.*), so
we drop it here — published .d.ts targets generic Node 20+ / Bun /
Deno consumers. Tests still use Bun's runner via the dev config.
